acceptance_targets: [CH11-BOOKER-001] Pass if a reader can remove the line at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:162 and still clearly understand why expedite eligibility is granted from on-page policy/criteria in the surrounding passage (snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:150-180). Fail if approval still appears to hinge on personal connection.

[CH11-CRAFT-001] Pass if the revised section between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:96 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:150 has at least one clearly escalated consequence that changes Marisol's options before the certificate pull. Fail if the sequence still reads as four interchangeable queue updates with no new cost.

[CH11-CRAFT-002] Pass if the revised meeting moment (around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:367-371) contains more than a single generic supportive line and shows a concrete shift in Marisol's state caused by that interaction. Fail if it remains one-line reassurance with no scene-level pressure.

[FBR-C01-003] Pass if the chapter explicitly acknowledges multiple inherited dates and justifies the selected archive search range in the cited span; fail if it still frames November-only family memory as uncontested fact.
[FBR-C01-006] Pass if chapter_11 opens directly inside archive procedure and avoids the repeated 'By the time + transit + weather' structure; fail if the current scaffold remains.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reader can remove the line at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:162 and still clearly understand why expedite eligibility is granted from on-page policy/criteria in the surrounding passage (snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:150-180). Fail if approval still appears to hinge on personal connection.
findings.problem: The chapter's key acceleration (10-business-day delay to same-day pull) is introduced right after a personal connection reveal, which risks reading as convenience instead of inevitability from prior causal setup.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:150 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:166, foreground the procedural trigger (policy code + documented harm statement) before or independent of the niece mention at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:162 so the same-day path reads as system logic, not insider luck.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised section between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:96 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:150 has at least one clearly escalated consequence that changes Marisol's options before the certificate pull. Fail if the sequence still reads as four interchangeable queue updates with no new cost.
findings.problem: Procedural exposition dominates the middle run with stacked transaction beats (window, cashier, county desk, return queue), causing leverage movement to feel incremental rather than escalating.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress one redundant administrative beat across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:96, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:112, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:114, then reallocate that space before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:150 to a sharper consequence beat (time-loss, money-loss, relapse-risk, or legal-risk) that raises stakes before the reveal sequence.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised meeting moment (around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:367-371) contains more than a single generic supportive line and shows a concrete shift in Marisol's state caused by that interaction. Fail if it remains one-line reassurance with no scene-level pressure.
findings.problem: Timidity: after the chapter's harsh documentary reveal, the AA-room beat is compressed into a safe summary-plus-affirmation, retreating from the social/emotional volatility the setup has earned.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand the meeting exchange at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:367 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:369 with at least one frictional or destabilizing response and one embodied reaction from Marisol, while keeping meeting anonymity and pace.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the chapter explicitly acknowledges multiple inherited dates and justifies the selected archive search range in the cited span; fail if it still frames November-only family memory as uncontested fact.
findings.problem: Cross-chapter contradiction in investigatory logic: chapter_11 says family has said November 1992 for years, which clashes with chapter_05's established June memorial-date narrative unless the shift is explicitly explained.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3828-3834 (and supporting context near snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:4009 if needed) so Marisol names the conflicting prior dates and explains why she is searching the October-December window now.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if chapter_11 opens directly inside archive procedure and avoids the repeated 'By the time + transit + weather' structure; fail if the current scaffold remains.
findings.problem: Adjacent-chapter cadence repetition: chapter_11 reuses the same transit-weather 'By the time...' opening skeleton, reducing rhythmic distinction from chapters around it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3701-3706 so the chapter begins at bureaucratic friction (line, forms, fee gatekeeping, clerk interaction) rather than another commute setup.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
